# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Write Envoy proxy configuration for HTTP traffic routing. Define listeners on port 80, clusters for backend services, and routes to match requests. Configure connection pooling and health checks for upstream services. This is for our API gateway proxy.
# Category: envoy_no_tls

apiVersion: envoy.config.mesh/v1alpha1
kind: Config
resources:
- name: listener
  resource:
    apiVersion: envoy.config.listener/v1alpha1
    kind: Listener
    metadata:
      name: listener
    spec:
      port: 80
      routes:
        - name: route1
          match:
            prefix: /api1/
          cluster: backend1
        - name: route2
          match:
            prefix: /api2/
          cluster: backend2
- name: cluster
  resource:
    apiVersion: envoy.config.cluster/v1alpha1
    kind: Cluster
    metadata:
      name: backend1
    spec:
      hosts:
        - host: backend1.example.com
          port: 80
      connectionPool:
        maxConnections: 100
      healthChecks:
        - timeout: 1s
          interval: 5s
          unhealthyThreshold: 3
          healthyThreshold: 3
- name: cluster
  resource:
    apiVersion: envoy.config.cluster/v1alpha1
    kind: Cluster
    metadata:
      name: backend2
    spec:
      hosts:
        - host: backend2.example.com
          port: 80
      connectionPool:
        maxConnections: 100
      healthChecks:
        - timeout: 1s
          interval: 5s
          unhealthyThreshold: 3
          healthyThreshold: 3
---
